summary: Tested fully redesigned Kurate.org homepage (iter66). Backend stats/personas endpoints and full homepage UI (hero, search, trust badges, top ranked leaderboard, research intelligence sidebar, AI judge panel, live platform metrics, category grids, how-it-works, disclaimer, footer) all validated. All navigation CTAs (Explore rankings, Methodology, Model agreement -> /correlation, Validation signals -> /validation, top paper -> /paper/{id}, search submit with query param) work correctly. 7/7 backend tests pass; 13/13 frontend assertions pass.

issues: 'Recent papers' shows 0 (last 7 days) and 'Latest update' shows 111d ago — this is real data state, not a bug, but indicates the ingestion pipeline hasn't run in ~3+ months. May want to surface a freshness/stale indicator or trigger ingestion.

critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx (438 lines) is acceptable size but mixes inline styles with Tailwind; consider extracting font-family constants to reduce repetition (fontFamily Chivo / IBM Plex repeated ~8 times).
Anchor tags use href='/?...' which causes full-page reloads; consider react-router Link/navigate for in-app navigation parity with the rest of the app (Explore rankings CTA is an <a>, not a <Link>).

Backend homepage_stats uses estimated_document_count which is fine for speed; consider caching the aggregation results (top_papers, top_categories) for ~60s as this endpoint is hit on every homepage load.
Latest update is 111d ago — pipeline appears stale. Not a code bug, but the platform metrics dashboard makes this visible to every visitor.
test_credentials: None required for tested flows (homepage is public)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign verified end-to-end. /api/homepage/stats returns total_papers=10674, total_categories=21, total_matches=280194, top_papers (6), top_categories (5), categories (21), ai_judges=3. /api/homepage/personas returns 5 personas. All data-testids on HomePage.jsx are stable: hero-heading, cta-explore, cta-methodology, search-input, trust-badges, top-ranked-card, top-paper-{i}, signal-{model-agreement|validation|methodology}, reviewer-panel, live-metrics-section, metric-{label-slug}, topcat-{id}, cat-{id}, how-{i}, disclaimer-section, homepage-footer.
